flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lakeshore Technical College fell 30% between 2006 and 2009 (60.9% → 42.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at Lakeshore Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (42.8% vs 52.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lakeshore Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).
